main_fields_to_use: census_year, trading_name, clue_small_area, industry_anzsic4_description, seating_type, number_of_seats, longitude, latitude
notes: Use this as the main point dataset. Filter to census_year = 2024 and valid latitude/longitude.

dataset_name: Blocks for Census of Land Use and Employment (CLUE)
notes: Use only if you want a light City of Melbourne boundary under the hexes. Do not need Natural Earth for this local map.

dataset_name: Business establishments per CLUE industry for blocks
notes: Use for a block choropleth alternative, not needed for true point-based hexbin.
